alt_text: Two diagrams. Left: a circle with blue arrows running around the outside labelled 'ظاہر' (zahir, manifest, outer) at the top and 'باطن' (batin, hidden, inner) at the bottom; a red inner circle marks the inner trajectory; the left and right intersection points are labelled 'ابتدا' (beginning) and 'انتہا' (end). Right: a small green dome with a single dot at the base, suggesting a starting point.
notes: Visualises the zahir/batin cycle: outer and inner circumferences sharing the same beginning and end. Pedagogical for Ismaili esoteric exegesis.
